description: Tenable is the exposure management company, exposing and closing the cybersecurity gaps that erode business value, reputation and trust. The company’s AI-powered exposure management platform radically unifies security visibility, insight and action across the attack surface, equipping modern organizations to protect against attacks from IT infrastructure to cloud environments to critical infrastructure and everywhere in between. By protecting enterprises from security exposure, Tenable reduces business risk for more than 44,000 customers around the globe. Learn more at tenable.com.
description_enriched: Beth Eats is a company that provides food and drinks.
description_metadata_raw: As a leader in vulnerability management, Tenable helps you know, expose and close cyber risk using robust cloud security and exposure management tools.

company_updates.description:
Want to take a peek at your fellow cybersecurity practitioners’ thoughts on topics such as exposure response, patch management, and security tool sprawl?

We’re revisiting some of our most insightful webinar polls of 2025. ➡️ http://spr.ly/60447sdhI

Don’t miss our keynote at Black Hat MEA 2025. Tenable Co-CEO Mark Thurmond will share how AI-powered #ExposureManagement is the next era of cyber defense.

Visit us at Hall 1, Booth #S10 to see Tenable One — the world’s leading AI-powered Exposure Management platform that unifies visibility, insight, and action across IT, cloud, OT, and critical infrastructure. Get more info here: http://spr.ly/60447o0Z0

They said cybersecurity isn’t stylish. We said: hold our sweater. 🧥

The Tenable partner exclusive drop is back — and it’s so good, you’ll never want to take it off.

Reach out to your Tenable Channel Manager to find out how you can get one, too! #MinExposureMaxStyle

😬 Fear of a bad patch causing downtime is justified, but manual patching leaves your organization exposed.

See how Tenable Patch Management provides autonomy with customizable rules and guardrails, allowing you to rapidly remediate critical vulnerabilities without risking business disruption.

Read more: http://spr.ly/60497WyXP

#exposuremanagement #patchmanagement

Tenable is headed to #AWSreInvent 2025! ☁️

Stop by Booth #251 to explore how you can see all your cloud security risks, close exposures fast, and gain unmatched risk context across your full cloud stack with Tenable One. Amazon Web Services (AWS)

#exposuremanagement #cloudsecurity

🛡️ Cyber agencies call on ISPs to help combat "bulletproof" internet hosts that shield #cybercriminals
⚠️ #CSA introduced a new methodology to assess the risks of autonomous AI
📊 The latest on the #CIS Benchmarks

Read the full Snapshot here: http://spr.ly/60487cQJg

#Giveaway time! 🎁 The #MinExposureMaxStyle sweaters that have been taking over social media are officially up for grabs.

Want one? Just tell us in the comments ⬇️ where you’d wear yours if you got one. Ice bath? Board meeting? Airport security line?

That’s it! Winners will be chosen next week. Full terms and conditions can be found here. http://spr.ly/60417i4k3

Last night’s #QuestMeansBusiness on CNN featured Tenable’s Steve Vintz. Our co-CEO and host Richard Quest discussed #trust, #risk and what’s needed in the cybersecurity industry to combat the barrage of threats and AI-fueled attacks organizations are experiencing. 

The answer: “We need to fundamentally rethink our approach to cybersecurity when it comes to AI and how we manage risk. For decades the security industry has been built around detection and response. We simply can’t be fighting fires and trying to detect breaches. We need to move to more proactive measures (through exposure management).” 

Watch here: http://spr.ly/60447isI8

#ExposureManagement #cybersecurity #AI

Fast-moving cloud environments are full of small gaps that can become big problems. Public storage, untagged databases, unchecked permissions — the risks add up quickly. Understanding what’s exposed and acting early makes all the difference. #exposuremanagement #cloudsecurity 

See what we mean: http://spr.ly/60467igYC
If you can make it here, you can make it anywhere. #1 in #ExposureManagement looks good on the big board! #nasdaq #TENB. 📍 See what we’re talking about: http://spr.ly/604579HDX

Proud to share that Tenable has been named a Leader in the first-ever Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Exposure Assessment Platforms! This is monumental, with Tenable positioned highest in both Ability to Execute and Completeness of Vision.

For me, this validates the journey we embarked on years ago to understand the changing threat landscape and help customers identify the exposures that mattered the most to them. To see how well we’ve adapted along the way and how that’s led to our #ExposureManagement market share and the trust of 40,000+ customers, speaks volumes. This isn't just a report. It's confirmation that Tenable is delivering measurable risk reduction and real business value.

My deepest gratitude to our customers for their trust and our dedicated team for their relentless execution. We're just getting started!

Learn more: https://lnkd.in/eJk_XJKK 
#Tenable #GartnerMQ #Cybersecurity #Leadership #ExposureManagement

We’re proud to share that Tenable has been named a Leader in the first-ever Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Exposure Assessment Platforms. 

Our mission has always been clear: help organizations reduce cyber risk. See the news: http://spr.ly/60437TmQD

✅ Streamline Security and IT collaboration to shorten MTTR

Picking an #exposuremanagement platform? Ask the questions that matter:

🔹 Can you see my entire attack surface?
🔹 Do you dig deeper than a simple software version check?
🔹 You found a problem. How do you help us fix it?

Read the full list of 7 must-ask questions from Christopher Day, VP of Research at Tenable → http://spr.ly/60467M70Q

🚨 #TenableResearch has discovered #HackedGPT — seven vulnerabilities and attack techniques in #ChatGPT-4o, some of which persist in ChatGPT-5.

These flaws could allow attackers to bypass safety mechanisms, steal personal data, and even plant lasting malicious instructions in #AI memory. 

➡️ Read the full research and Tenable’s recommendations for security teams: http://spr.ly/60427Mwr0

When every alert feels urgent, it’s hard to know where to start. Tenable One gives #MSSPs the full picture, helping them prioritize exposure and protect clients proactively. 

See how #exposuremanagement turns insights into action: http://spr.ly/60447ztTE

Tenable is excited to be in National Harbor, MD for Ingram Micro ONE this week!
We will be on the solution showcase floor and would love to have folks stop by our booth and connect with the team.

Attendees can also join us for the Tenable breakout session "Exposing Hidden Risks: Securing AI Workloads in the Cloud Era," on Tuesday at 2:00 PM ET presented by Frank Passman.
We look forward to seeing you there.

#IMONE #ExposureManagement #GrowWithTenable Sherrie Quagliana Jordan Reynolds Robert Longhurst Gerardo Chovet Benjamin Elkington

Ever patch a vulnerability only to find it’s already spread somewhere else? That’s the cloud — one small misstep can ripple fast. Seeing how assets, identities, and sensitive data connect lets teams act before problems snowball.

Context isn’t nice-to-have. It’s the difference between chasing alerts and stopping issues in their tracks.

More here: http://spr.ly/604871azo

#exposuremanagement #cloudsecurity

#ShadowAI is challenging security leaders with many of the same issues raised by other “shadow” technologies. Only this time, it’s evolving at breakneck speed. Tenable CSO Robert Huber how to address this with a proactive approach 🔗: http://spr.ly/604071jSj

🚨 2.17. That’s the average number of cloud breaches orgs faced in just 18 months. Yet only 8% were labeled “severe.”

The problem? Security is being measured by what’s already gone wrong, not by risk reduction.  Learn about the value of reducing and preventing risk in the first place: http://spr.ly/6046At0Ai

Learn how the bank improved configuration management, boosted operational efficiency, and laid the groundwork for unified cloud and identity security with Tenable. http://spr.ly/6045AsPQ9

Today I had the opportunity to give a keynote address at #CyberNext and emphasize the necessary shift from reactive to preventive cybersecurity - aka #exposuremanagement. Rather than reacting to every new threat, organizations need to use intelligence, context, and AI to anticipate attacks and proactively reduce risk. I emphasized the need for continued investment in and funding for our national cybersecurity programs in order to keep pace with the growing adversarial risks we're seeing.

It's a good reminder that even during a government shutdown, cybersecurity remains a top priority, and we're reinforcing the need for public-private collaboration to strengthen the nation’s resilience.
Our teams are stronger because of the people on them. #HispanicHeritageMonth is a chance to celebrate the perspectives and experiences that make that possible.

Stop pretending your cloud is safe. It’s not. Every overprivileged account is an open invitation to attackers. 

Tenable One locks it down, without slowing anyone down: http://spr.ly/6045AU5RV

#exposuremanagement #cloudsecurity

New #TenableResearch discovery 🚨: The "Gemini Trifecta" exposed three critical, now-remediated vulnerabilities in Google's #GeminiAI, highlighting how new attack classes target sensitive user data. This research is a crucial reminder that #AIsecurity is non-negotiable.

This proof-of-concept (POC) video shows how an attacker uses JavaScript to manipulate the victim’s browser history, forces them to visit a malicious website, injects malicious prompts into their Gemini, and then exfiltrates the victim’s data.

company_updates.reshared_post_author_headline: Software Supply Chain Research | DEFCON & Black Hat 2025 | DevSecOps Leader | Top 100 Australian Tech Innovators | PLG Startup Founder & Advisor | Snowboarder | @6mile
company_updates.reshared_post_description:
While at #BlackHat last week, I stopped by the #Tenable booth as I wanted a demo of the enhanced Tenable One platform and, in particular, their new CSPM offering. I was really impressed with the demo, and I really liked how it blended Tenable vulnerability scanning data into a #CSPM context. They're not just slapping together misconfig detection with some basic scanning - they've built something that addresses the entire cloud security lifecycle.

But, then I was surprised to see that Tenable One has also expanded to include ASPM functions‼️  Right now, it's just IaC scanning, but the GitHub and GitLab integrations are there, so I imagine that a true #ASPM play is in the near future. The way that Tenable has blended code scanning insights into their vulnerability data, and then bubbled them into other parts of the platform, is very cool. Having built this with SecureStack before, I know how hard it is. 

What Tenable is building here is pretty slick, and if you are looking at Wiz or any other CSPM product, you might wanna check it out: 👉 https://bit.ly/4mbhg3e

company_updates.description:
SRF Limited, a chemical-based multi-business entity, has adopted the Tenable One Exposure Management Platform to unify risk visibility across #IT and #OT environments. As cyber threats grow more sophisticated, SRF is leading the way in securing industrial systems with a proactive, centralized approach.

“Tenable has helped us continuously assess and prioritize IT risks for years. We are now extending that confidence into OT with Tenable One, gaining a unified view of our exposure, whether at headquarters or on the factory floor.” — Rajeev Verma, CISO, SRF Limited

Learn more about this customer story: http://spr.ly/6042fpkMK

#exposuremanagement #cybersecurity
